aboutSection.title: About Our School
aboutSection.description: Haramaya University Non-Boarding Secondary School is a government secondary school located on the Haramaya University campus. We serve students in Grades 9-12, committed to academic excellence and the Model School initiative. Our focus is on providing quality education that prepares students for higher learning and future success.
aboutSection.visionText: To be a model secondary school that nurtures ethical, innovative, and academically excellent learners.
aboutSection.missionText: Provide a supportive learning environment, modern pedagogy, and community partnership to raise future-ready graduates.
aboutSection.goalsText: Strengthen academic achievement, digital literacy, student wellbeing, and leadership development for all grades 9–12.

faqSection.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqSection.description: Find answers to common questions about the Student Information Management System
faqSection.systemAccessDesc: Different users have different access levels based on their role in the school community.

faqs.q1: How do I register as a student?
faqs.a1: Students can register through the system by creating an account using their student ID. You'll need to provide personal information, contact details, and upload required documents. The registration process is verified by school administration.
faqs.q2: Can parents access their child's academic records?
faqs.a2: Yes, parents can view their child's grades, attendance, and academic progress by logging into their parent account.
faqs.q3: What if I forget my password?
faqs.a3: You can reset your password using the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page. You'll receive a password reset link via email. If you don't receive the email, please contact the school IT support.
faqs.a4: Yes, the system uses industry-standard encryption and security measures to protect all student and staff data.
faqs.a5: Teachers can submit grades through their dashboard by accessing the class management section and entering student scores. The system automatically calculates final grades.
faqs.q6: Where can I find exam schedules?
faqs.a6: Exam schedules are posted in the Announcements section and are also available in the student dashboard.

rolesSection.studentsDesc: View grades, attendance, announcements, and personal records
rolesSection.parentsDesc: Monitor academic progress and communicate with teachers
rolesSection.teachersDesc: Manage grades, attendance, and class materials
rolesSection.administratorsDesc: Full system access for school management
